form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr5) over 2240m at this track, beaten 3.5 m by Always Be Blakey (2:43.90) in NR 75 to 88 on April 4 at $26. At the start before 4th (Sr6) over 1720m at this track was 4th-5.83 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Komodo (2:01.00) in NR80 on March 28 at $13. Draws the inside so worth another chance.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr4) over 2570m at Charlton beaten 14 m by Miki To Success (3:03.00) in No NR on March 15 at $71. Draws for a good showing.

form.formComment: Second-up here following a spell. Game effort when 3rd (Sr1) over 1720m at this track beaten 3.5 m by Repelling (2:03.50) in NR 67 to 75 on April 4 at $31. Fitter so may prove tough to beat.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 6 m finishing fifth behind Ollies The Boss at Bendigo over 2150m in a 3yo No NR CG on November 26 at $7.50. Readied with a solid trial so keep safe.
